## What would you like to see?

<!-- A clear description of the feature or change you need. -->

## Why do you need it?

<!-- The use case. What are you trying to do that you can't do today, or what
     went wrong? A concrete scenario is far easier to scope than a generic ask. -->

## What have you tried or considered instead?

<!-- Workarounds, alternative approaches, or other tools you've used to fill the
     gap. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else — links, references, screenshots, related issues. -->
